title: WTFIT
description: A modernization of the classic WAILA in simple and effective way!
body:
# Simple and Effective
Most modern "What am I Looking at"-style mods are complex, filled with redundancies, and not what I'm looking what. WTFIT is a simple, effective answer to "what the **** is that?" No unnecessary items, no set up. Classic "here's the block, here's what you need to break it, here's the mod it's from" and "here's the entity, here's its health bar, here's the mod it's from" Simple and effective!

# Modifiable
The mod has inbuilt support for mods to add their own tool levels and override some other functions as necessary.
